title: erysimum × turdense
intro: Erysimum × turdense, also known as Wallflower, is a flowering plant species that is a hybrid of the Erysimum cheiri and Erysimum crepidifolium. The plant has been used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties. The health benefits of Erysimum × turdense include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and boost the immune system, as well as its potential to treat respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used in teas, infusions, and tinctures to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
